persona: Calm customer who wants to check their balance
goal: verify the caller then read out the account balance

tools.name: verify_identity
tools.description: verify the caller before any sensitive action

tools.name: lock_card
tools.description: lock a card by its last 4 digits after identity is verified

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: return current account balance for an account id

agenda.user: Hello, I would like to check my account balance please.
agenda.note: Chua xac thuc -> chua du dieu kien goi tool nhay cam

agenda.user: It is Maria Lopez, born July 12th 1985.
